x-component-props.content: Settings to customize blocklet uploading and pricing

maxBundleSize.title: Max Bundle Size (MB)
maxBundleSize.name: maxBundleSize
maxBundleSize.description: Max blocklet bundle size this store allows, blocklets that exceeds this setting will be rejected on uploading.

allowPaidBlocklets.title: Allow Paid Blocklets
allowPaidBlocklets.name: allowPaidBlocklets
allowPaidBlocklets.description: A restart to blocklet store is required if you turn this on for the first time.

maxPrice.title: Max Price (ABT)
maxPrice.description: Maximum price can be set for a paid blocklet
maxPrice.name: maxPrice

minPrice.title: Min Price (ABT)
minPrice.description: Minimum price can be set for a paid blocklet
minPrice.name: minPrice

shareRequirement.title: Share Requirement
shareRequirement.description: Percentage of revenue share for each blocklet purchase
shareRequirement.name: shareRequirement

x-component-props.content: Customize how developers get access to this store and publish blocklets from this store

state.description: {{$self.value === 'staking' ? 'In staking based mode, users need to stake to get developer passport and publish blocklets (every time).' : 'In inviting based mode, users need to be invited to get the developer passport, then they can publish blocklets without any limitation.'}}

passportStakeAmount.title: Passport Stake Amount
passportStakeAmount.name: passportStakeAmount
passportStakeAmount.description: Amount of [Currency] to stake for the developer passport

passportRevokeWaitingDays.title: Passport Stake Revoke Waiting Period
passportRevokeWaitingDays.name: passportRevokeWaitingDays
passportRevokeWaitingDays.description: Waiting period before developer can claim revoked stakes for their developer passport (in days)

publishStakeAmount.title: Publish Stake Amount
publishStakeAmount.name: publishStakeAmount
publishStakeAmount.description: Amount of ABT to stake for each publish publish, this is also used as base staking amount for paid blocklets

publishRevokeWaitingDays.title: Publish Stake Revoke Waiting Period
publishRevokeWaitingDays.name: publishRevokeWaitingDays
publishRevokeWaitingDays.description: Waiting period before developer can claim revoked stakes for their blocklet publish (in days)

launcherUrl.title: Blocklet Launcher URL
launcherUrl.name: launcherUrl
launcherUrl.description: Users will be redirect to this launcher service on launch blocklets

imageMinHeight.title: Image Min Height (px)
imageMinHeight.name: imageMinHeight
imageMinHeight.description: The image aspect ratio is fixed at 16:10

searchBlockletsInstructions.title: search blocklets instructions
searchBlockletsInstructions.name: searchBlockletsInstructions
searchBlockletsInstructions.default: As an app store search assistant, generate 5 relevant lowercase single-word English keywords, e.g., output 'demo' instead of 'demo app', to help users efficiently find apps. Input: {{ question }}

x-component-props.content: Automatically clean up old blocklet version tarballs to reclaim disk space. DB records are preserved for audit.

retentionEnabled.title: Enable Retention
retentionEnabled.description: Enable automatic version cleanup. When disabled, no cleanup will run.
retentionEnabled.name: retentionEnabled

retentionDryRun.title: Dry Run Mode
retentionDryRun.description: When enabled, only logs what would be deleted without actually removing files. Recommended to enable first to preview cleanup scope.
retentionDryRun.name: retentionDryRun

retentionKeepVersions.title: Keep Published Versions
retentionKeepVersions.description: Number of most recent published versions to keep per blocklet.
retentionKeepVersions.name: retentionKeepVersions

retentionKeepMinDays.title: Min Retention Days
retentionKeepMinDays.description: Published versions within this many days will never be cleaned up.
retentionKeepMinDays.name: retentionKeepMinDays

retentionStaleDraftDays.title: Stale Draft Days
retentionStaleDraftDays.description: DRAFT, REJECTED, and CANCELLED versions older than this will be cleaned up.
retentionStaleDraftDays.name: retentionStaleDraftDays
